privilege escalation.description: Attackers gain elevated permissions on a target system.

credential theft.description: Attackers steal credentials for unauthorized access.

command and control.description: Compromised hosts communicate with attacker-controlled infrastructure.

lateral movement.description: Attackers move between systems within a network.

data exfiltration.description: Sensitive data is transferred out of the environment.

reconnaissance.description: Attackers gather information before launching attacks.

defense evasion.description: Attackers attempt to avoid detection mechanisms.

phishing.description: Attackers trick users into revealing sensitive information.

spear phishing.description: Targeted phishing attack against specific individuals.

active scanning.description: Attackers actively scan infrastructure and services.

impact.description: Attackers disrupt availability or integrity of systems.

botnet.description: Network of compromised devices controlled remotely.

malware.description: Software intentionally designed to cause damage.

ransomware.description: Malware encrypting files and demanding ransom.

credential dumping.description: Attackers extract credentials from memory or storage.

sql injection.description: Injection of malicious SQL queries into database operations.

cross-site scripting.description: Malicious scripts injected into trusted websites.

cross-site request forgery.description: Unauthorized commands transmitted from trusted users.

sensitive data exposure.description: Exposure of sensitive or confidential information.

xml external entity.description: XML parser processes malicious external entities.

directory traversal.description: Attackers traverse directories to access restricted files.

remote file inclusion.description: Remote malicious files included in application execution.
